item.description:
Release v4.11.0

Changes since v4.10.0

  • docs: move API docs to plugin & add concurrency roadmap
  • feat: add Aliyun TokenPlan provider
  • feat: unify toolbar containers and add bottom shadow
  • feat: update Aliyun Coding Plan model list to match official docs
  • feat(aliyun): add new models to CodingPlan
  • feat(autotask): silent auto-continuation without user-visible nudge
  • feat(conversation-list): switch app's current project when selecting a conversation
  • feat(layout): add bottom panel visibility state
  • feat(LumiUI): add AppShadowLevel for toolbar container shadow control
  • feat(model-selector): display 14-day usage bar chart on provider cards
  • feat(plugins): add provider settings views for Codex and MLX
  • fix: add localization to DeviceInfoPlugin views
  • fix: add verbose guards for debug logs to comply with logging spec
  • fix: fix layout recursion crashes across multiple files
  • fix: resolve compilation errors for Aliyun TokenPlan Provider
  • fix(i18n): standardize onboarding localization keys to English
  • fix(ui): adjust PanelHeaderView zIndex for proper shadow layering
  • fix(ui): improve toolbar shadow and background styling
  • fix(ui): improve toolbar shadow visibility on opaque backgrounds
  • fix(ui): remove appToolbarUndershadow modifier
